cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. There are five players: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They start with specific positions and then swap several times. I need to track each swap and figure out where Eve ends up. Let me write down the initial positions first. After first swap: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Center Midfielder - Claire: Right Midfielder - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions. So Claire becomes Center Midfielder and Bob becomes Right Midfielder. After second swap: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Right Midfielder - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. So Alice becomes Right Midfielder and Bob becomes Fullback. After third swap: - Alice: Right Midfielder - Bob: Fullback - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade positions again. So Eve goes back to Goalkeeper and Dave becomes Left Winger. After fourth swap: - Alice: Right Midfielder - Bob: Fullback - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Goalkeeper Fifth swap: Bob and Alice trade positions. So Bob becomes Right Midfielder and Alice becomes Fullback. After fifth swap: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Right Midfielder - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Goalkeeper Wait, so the final positions are: - Alice is back to Fullback. - Bob is now Right Midfielder. - Claire remains Center Midfielder. - Dave is back to Left Winger. - Eve is Goalkeeper. But the question is asking where Eve is playing at the end. According to my tracking, after the fourth swap, Eve was Goalkeeper, and there was no further swap involving Eve. The final swap was between Bob and Alice, which doesn't involve Eve. So Eve remains Goalkeeper. Wait, but let me check again. Let me retrace each step carefully. Initial positions: 1. Dave and Eve swap: Eve becomes Left Winger, Dave becomes Goalkeeper. 2. Claire and Bob swap: Claire becomes Center Midfielder (no, wait, Claire was Right Midfielder and swaps with Bob who was Center Midfielder. So Claire becomes Center Midfielder, Bob becomes Right Midfielder. 3. Alice and Bob swap: Alice becomes Right Midfielder, Bob becomes Fullback. 4. Eve and Dave swap back: Eve is back to Goalkeeper, Dave is back to Left Winger. 5. Bob and Alice swap again: Bob becomes Right Midfielder, Alice becomes Fullback. So Eve's position after step 4 is Goalkeeper, and step 5 doesn't involve Eve. Therefore, Eve is still Goalkeeper at the end. But wait, the options include (E) goalkeeper as one of the options. But the answer options have (E) as goalkeeper. So the answer should be E. But wait, let me check again. Maybe I made a mistake in tracking? Initial positions: - Alice: Fullback (FB) - Bob: Center Midfielder (CM) - Claire: Right Midfielder (RM) - Dave: Left Winger (LW) - Eve: Goalkeeper (GK) First swap: Dave and Eve. - Alice: FB - Bob: CM - Claire: RM - Dave: GK - Eve: LW Second swap: Claire and Bob. - Alice: FB - Bob: RM - Claire: CM - Dave: GK - Eve: LW Third swap: Alice and Bob. - Alice: RM - Bob: FB - Claire: CM - Dave: GK - Eve: LW Fourth swap: Eve and Dave. - Alice: RM - Bob: FB - Claire: CM - Dave: LW - Eve: GK Fifth swap: Bob and Alice. - Alice: FB - Bob: RM - Claire: CM - Dave: LW - Eve: GK So yes, final positions: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Right Midfielder - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Goalkeeper Therefore, Eve is playing as goalkeeper at the end.
